---
title: "file1"
author: "Kimberly McNeil"
date: "4/21/2026"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<h1>My Days</h1>

<p>
  I get up, go to class, do clubs/work, do homework, play games or read, then go to bed.
</p>

<p>
  Current game is <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hollow_Knight:_Silksong">Silksong</a>, which is fun :)
</p>

<p>
  To read about the bane of my existence, visit my other <a href="file2.Rmd">page</a>
</p>
